name: Costa Group Holdings Limited
summary: Costa Group Holdings Limited produces, packs, and markets fruits and vegetables to food retailers. The company operates through three segments: Produce, Costa Farms & Logistics, and International. It offers mushrooms, raspberries, strawberries, blackberries, tomatoes, citrus, avocados, bananas, grapes, and other fruits. The company also provides chilled logistics warehousing and services, as well as wholesale and marketing services. In addition, it engages in licensing blueberry varieties in Australia, the Americas, China, Africa, and internationally; and berry farming activities in Morocco and China. The company has approximately 4,700 planted hectares of farmland, 30 hectares of glasshouse facilities, and 3 mushroom growing facilities in Australia. It also exports its products. The company was founded in 1888 and is based in Ravenhall, Australia.
